overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a static nighttime scene of a rooftop campfire gathering. A group of characters sit around a blazing bonfire with the neon-lit Night City skyline visible in the background, creating a moody atmosphere with contrasting warm firelight and cool blue city glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop campfire gathering overlooking futuristic city skyline

agents.ego_description: standing still at the edge of the campfire gathering, observing the group and the illuminated city skyline

notable_agents.action: sitting in a camping chair near the bonfire, facing the flames
standing and gesturing with arms raised while facing the fire

entered.detail: large blazing campfire with tall flames and sparks illuminating the surrounding area
tall skyscrapers with distinctive blue neon lighting including twin towers visible in the distance
tall palm tree silhouette with fronds against the night sky
tall decorative tree structure with circular crown silhouette
folding chairs arranged in a semicircle around the bonfire
red metal barrel near the group of standing characters

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime scene on a rooftop overlooking a futuristic city. A group of characters gathers around a blazing central bonfire, with some seated in camping chairs and others standing. The background features a stunning view of a neon-lit cyberpunk skyline with distinctive twin towers, while palm tree silhouettes frame the scene on both sides. The atmosphere is calm and social, with warm firelight contrasting against the cool blue city glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze over a nighttime rooftop gathering that emphasizes the contrast between intimate warmth and a vast, futuristic metropolis. It begins with a focus on a group of characters huddled around a blazing central bonfire, where some rest in camping chairs while others stand in quiet conversation. As the warm firelight flickers across the group, the view expands to reveal the surrounding environment, framed by the dark silhouettes of palm trees on either side. The scene finally settles on the stunning backdrop of the neon-lit cyberpunk skyline, where the cool blue glow of distant twin towers looms over the social gathering.
